name: Low-Cal Ricotta Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: Orange peel, grated (no white part) (1 tablespoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Grease a 9-inch springform pan or spray with nonstick spray.
3. To make the crust, place graham crackers, butter, brown sugar, and ginger in the bowl of a food processor. Process until well combined. Press into the bottom of the springform pan.
4. Place the pan in the oven and bake 5 to 8 minutes. Remove from the oven and set aside to cool.
5. To make the filling, place ricotta, eggs, egg white, buttermilk, sugar, vanilla, orange peel, and juice in the bowl of a food processor or electric mixer. Process or mix until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture into the cooled crust, place on a baking sheet, place in the oven, and place a pan of water in the bottom of the oven.
7. Bake 45 to 60 minutes, or until set.
8. Yield: 8-10 servings
